title: lessingia heterochroma
intro: Lessingia heterochroma, also known as Purple Tansy or Mountain Fiddleneck, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. Consuming Lessingia heterochroma has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Lessingia heterochroma can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and health benefits, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
